options.name: CLI Hero
options.subtitle: Portable preview
options.description: Ship the same banner generator without the browser runtime.

options.name: Dot Grid
options.subtitle: Matrix mode
options.description: A fixed dotted backdrop to prove the static background path.

options.name: Gridlines
options.subtitle: Blueprint
options.description: Light mode grid rendering should match the browser version.

options.name: Scanlines
options.subtitle: Analog distortion
options.description: Interrupted line segments create the same scan texture as the site.

options.name: Contour Field
options.subtitle: Topographic void
options.description: Marching-squares contours should be deterministic when a seed is supplied.

options.name: Striped Warp
options.subtitle: Procedural zebra
options.description: Warped stripes exercise the most expensive background renderer.

options.name: Extraordinary Hero Generator
options.description: A long description should wrap into at most three lines while keeping the bordered layout and centered vertical rhythm intact for command-line generated assets.
